user_query: I want to explore the pageant history and need information about the countries involved. Get me a list of all countries that have participated in pageant contests. Also, fetch the details of the country with the ID 123. Moreover, search for companies in the same industry using the CNAE code 123456. Additionally, verify the PAN card number XYZAB5678D and provide the details.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of all countries that have participated in pageant contests.
Fetch the details of the country with the ID 123.
Search for companies in the same industry using the CNAE code 123456.
Verify the PAN card number XYZAB5678D and provide the details.
